summary: Mobile UI testing completed for POS system fixes on viewport 390x844. All reported issues have been verified as FIXED: 1) Clientes page - action buttons (edit pencil, canjear gift) are fully visible and not cut off. 2) Reports page - full-width menu on mobile (no sidebar), full-width report content with '☰ Reportes' menu button to go back. 3) Estacion/Apariencia/Modificadores - all content scrollable to bottom with pb-28 padding, buttons visible above nav bar.

test_1_clientes_page.header: CLIENTES header with star (☆) and plus (+) icons visible
test_1_clientes_page.conclusion: Action buttons NOT cut off - FIXED

test_2_reports_page_menu.categories_visible: 4 categories: Ventas y Caja, Inventario/Almacén/Compras, Fiscal, Auditoría y Operaciones
test_2_reports_page_menu.conclusion: Full-width menu replaces sidebar on mobile - FIXED

test_3_reports_cierre_del_dia.menu_button: ☰ Reportes button at x=12 - allows going back to menu
test_3_reports_cierre_del_dia.data_displayed: Total Ventas RD$ 28,964.00, 40 Facturas, ITBIS, Propinas, Efectivo, Tarjeta, 7-day trend chart
test_3_reports_cierre_del_dia.conclusion: Full-width report content with menu button - FIXED

test_4_reports_ventas_por_mesero.bar_chart: Full-width bar chart showing Admin, OSCAR, Carlos Mesero
test_4_reports_ventas_por_mesero.detail_cards: Admin (34 facturas, RD$ 19,620), OSCAR (4 facturas, RD$ 4,864), Carlos Mesero (2 facturas, RD$ 4,480)
test_4_reports_ventas_por_mesero.conclusion: Bar chart and detail cards full-width and readable - FIXED

test_5_estacion_scroll.cajas_visible: 3 cajas (CAJA 3, Caja 1, Caja 2) with edit/delete buttons
test_5_estacion_scroll.buttons_position: All buttons visible above nav bar
test_5_estacion_scroll.conclusion: pb-28 padding working - all content visible above nav bar

test_6_apariencia_scroll.guardar_tema_button: y=620, bottom=664 - visible above nav bar
test_6_apariencia_scroll.conclusion: GUARDAR TEMA and Admin preference visible above nav bar - FIXED

test_7_modificadores_scroll.modifier_groups: Temperatura, SIN, SALSAS - all with edit/delete buttons
test_7_modificadores_scroll.buttons_position: All buttons visible above nav bar
test_7_modificadores_scroll.conclusion: All modifier groups visible above nav bar - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Customers.js: Compact header with icon buttons (Star, Plus) and customer cards with pencil/gift icon buttons - all within viewport
Reports.js: Mobile layout uses md:hidden for sidebar, full-width menu with mobileMenuOpen state, '☰ Reportes' button to return to menu
settings/index.js: pb-28 sm:pb-6 padding ensures content is not hidden by fixed nav bar
ProductConfig.js: pb-28 sm:pb-4 padding for scroll content
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile UI fixes verified: 1) Clientes page action buttons visible (not cut off), 2) Reports page has full-width menu on mobile with menu button to go back, 3) All settings pages (Estacion, Apariencia, Modificadores) have proper pb-28 padding for scroll content above nav bar.
